title: Chapter 1: The Tsundere, the Prince, and the Voices of the Gods
overview: Kobayashi just dragged Endo into playing her favorite otome game with her! But if she’s an expert who knows all the spoilers, why does this playthrough feel kind of…different?

title: Chapter 2: The Wand, Maxed Out, and Favored by the Gods
overview: To change the villainess’ dire fate, Endo and Kobayashi must give Siegwald the inside scoop on Lieselotte’s emotions! But with such a tsundere, that’s easier said than done.

title: Chapter 3: The Ribbon, the Upperclassman, and Feelings of Love
overview: Endo and Kobayashi watch baseball. This is complicated for Endo, who gave up playing baseball due to an injury. Meanwhile, Lieselotte’s tsundere tendencies are strong as ever.

title: Chapter 4: The Summer, Going Home, and Missing You
overview: As the relationship between Fiene and Baldur takes a turn, Lieselotte succeeds in inviting Fiene to her home, with help from Siegwald. The two girls deepen their friendship.

title: Chapter 5: Mother and Daughter, Sisters, and a First Date
overview: As Endo and Kobayashi are transfixed by a reveal that didn’t exist in any of the in-game storylines, Elizabeth starts telling the tale of Fiene’s hidden origins.

title: Chapter 6: A Nightmare, the Coward, and the Princess Carry
overview: As three relationships take big steps forward, Fiene suddenly awakens to her powers, allowing her to hear Endo and Kobayashi’s voices.

title: Chapter 7: The Prophesy, the Little Boy, and the Live Broadcast
overview: Nightmares of the Witch of Yore are eating away at Lieselotte. Siegwald confirms his love for his fiancé. The two in love throw Endo and Kobayashi into an ecstatic frenzy!

title: Chapter 8: Master and Disciple, the Mask, and Tsundereally-Pissed
overview: Baldur promises to defeat the Witch of Yore himself. Meanwhile, Leon confesses that he adores Elizabeth, but he has reason to remain conflicted. Endo and Kobayashi look on.

title: The Dress, the School Festival, and Overflowing Emotions
overview: Lieselotte stands up for herself. Endo and Kobayashi are overjoyed to see Siegwald and Lieselotte share their feelings. Endo expresses his anxiety.

title: The Lirene Flower, the Ball, and the Witch
overview: The Festival of Gratitude arrives. Baldur and Fiene reconfirm their for each other. Meanwhile, time is running out until the showdown with the Witch of Yore.

title: The Witch, the Goddess, and the Creation Myth
overview: The Witch of Yore reveals herself at last, and her miasma threatens to swallow Lieselotte. Will the gang manage to defeat the Witch of Yore through the power of love?

title: The Best Happy End to End All Happy Ends!
overview: Siegwald proposes to Lieselotte. Chiyono gets kidnapped by Kuon. As the game world and reality intersect, how will their stories of love and strife pan out in the end?
